name: imperion
description: Canonical Claude Code skills for the Imperion CRM four-repo system. Skills are versioned here (the cross-repo source-of-truth repo, ADR-0060) and change only via the normal issue -> branch -> micro-PR loop.

plugins.name: imperion-skills
plugins.description: Imperion CRM domain contracts as on-demand skills: Graph access model, MSP source integrations (Autotask/IT Glue), the pinned vector contract, and future domain skills. Loads in any of the four Imperion repos.
